name: Frost
description: White background, light grey surfaces, deep blue accent. Inter font, light weights. Glassmorphism panels. Clean SaaS and product demo aesthetic.

typography.note: Glassmorphism panels: background:rgba(255,255,255,0.7); backdrop-filter:blur(16px); border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.9); border-radius:20px. Use accentAlt (#3b82f6) for interactive/highlight elements. Motion is crisp and fast — short durations (0.3–0.5s), power2 easing.

css.capText: font-family:'Inter',sans-serif; font-size:34px; font-weight:400; color:#0f172a; padding:0 140px; line-height:1.5;
